plugins.name: tdd-workflow
plugins.description: Test-driven development skill that enforces red-green-refactor, one test at a time

plugins.name: conventional-commits
plugins.description: Structured commit messages following the Conventional Commits specification

plugins.name: parallel-code-review
plugins.description: Run multiple code review agents in parallel for comprehensive feedback

plugins.name: meeting-transcript
plugins.description: Process meeting transcripts into structured notes with action items

plugins.name: cybersecurity-reviewer
plugins.description: Security analysis agent for vulnerability assessment and threat modeling

plugins.name: rails-toolkit
plugins.description: Complete Rails development workflow with TDD, security reviews, and Linear integration

plugins.name: gridfinity-planner
plugins.description: Plan and design gridfinity baseplates for 3D printing with optimal grid layouts

plugins.name: codebase-readiness
plugins.description: Score your codebase's readiness for autonomous AI agent work across 8 dimensions, framed around the Stripe benchmark of 1k+ AI-generated PRs per week

plugins.name: agent-ready
plugins.description: Make a codebase agent-ready by scaffolding AGENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, and docs/ structure following progressive disclosure patterns. Creates CLAUDE.md as a symlink for Claude Code compatibility.

plugins.name: doc-audit
plugins.description: Audit codebase documentation for accuracy, completeness, and freshness against actual code. Auto-fixes small discrepancies, reports structural changes. Companion to agent-ready.

plugins.name: doc-sentinel
plugins.description: Proactive documentation drift detector. Hooks into commits to identify docs referencing changed code, flags drift before staleness accumulates, and resolves warnings via targeted fixes.
